Base directory for this skill: /Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/catalog/.claude/skills/ab-testing

# A/B Testing in Catalog

This skill covers the full A/B test lifecycle using Signalman. Follow the stage that matches where you are in the process.

> **Optimizely migration in progress:** An A/A validation test (`edge_pc_signalmizely_aa_test_v0`) is running to validate Optimizely as a replacement for Signalman. Until migration is complete, continue using Signalman for new tests.

## Key Files

Every A/B test touches these four locations:

| File                    | Purpose                                              |
| ----------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- |
| `feature_flags.rb`      | Traffic split configuration                          |
| `CatalogCaching` module | Cache key constant + `catalog_page_ab_test_suffixes` |
| `SignalmanHelper`       | Ruby helper method for checking test assignment      |
| `SignalmanConstants.js` | Exported constant for React                          |

## Feature Flag Naming Rules

Apply all three rules to every new flag:

**Prefix with `pc_`** — Required for CloudFront cache key inclusion. Without this prefix, users in different test groups may be served the same cached page.

**Version with `_vN` suffix** — Start at `_v0` during setup (signals not yet launched). Bump to `_v1` at first launch to 10%.

**Keep names short** — Browser cookie limit is ~4KB total per domain. Use abbreviations.

Bad: `pc_new_plp_product_card_ux_improvements_use_pigment_v1`
Good: `pc_new_product_card_v1`

---

## Stage 1 — Creation (0% traffic)

### 1. `CatalogCaching` module

Create a new constant with the flag name:

```ruby
PC_NEW_PRODUCT_CARD = "pc_new_product_card_v0"
```

Update `catalog_page_ab_test_suffixes` to include the new flag so CloudFront builds correct cache keys.

### 2. `SignalmanHelper`

Create a method that checks if a request is opted in.

**Standard split** (split happens in Catalog):

```ruby
feature_flag(:pc_your_feature_flag) == "enabled"
```

The `feature_flag` method performs a traffic split unless a cookie is already set.

**Cookie-only check** (split happens in another app like PSR for landing pages):

```ruby
flag_from_cookie_for(:pc_your_feature_flag)
```

This only checks for the cookie presence — it does not split traffic.

Add custom logic if excluding internal users, PLA traffic, etc.

### 3. `feature_flags.rb`

Set up the test at 0% by defaulting to "excluded":

```ruby
feature :pc_new_product_card_v0, %w[test control excluded], "New Product Card" do
  "excluded"
end
```

### 4. `SignalmanConstants.js`

Export a const for React. Apply the same split logic as `SignalmanHelper` — use either `feature_flag` or `flag_from_cookie_for` depending on where the split occurs.

### CloudFront Caching

Catalog uses CloudFront with a limited set of URL params for cache keys. The `pc_` prefix tells CloudFront to include this parameter when building a cache key. Without it, users in different test groups could be served the same cached page, breaking the test.

---

## Stage 2 — Development

No A/B test configuration changes are needed during this stage — the flag is already set up at 0%.

To opt in to your experience visit `/products/signalman` and turn on your feature flag. This will set the appropriate cookie and allow you to test your feature logic as you build. This also helps you ship code faster in smaller increments since you can merge code behind the flag before ramping traffic.

### Checking Test Assignment in Rails

Use the helper method created during setup:

```ruby
if pc_new_product_card_enabled?
  # test group behavior
else
  # control group behavior
end
```

Under the hood this calls `feature_flag(:pc_new_product_card_v0) == "enabled"`.

If the split happens in another app (e.g., PSR for landing pages), the helper should use `flag_from_cookie_for` instead, which only reads the cookie without splitting traffic.

### Checking Test Assignment in React

Use the exported constant from `SignalmanConstants.js` and the equivalent JS Signalman methods (`feature_flag` or `flag_from_cookie_for`) to branch behavior on the client side.

### Tips

Keep test and control paths as isolated as possible so cleanup is straightforward later. Avoid deeply nesting conditional logic — prefer early returns or separate components/partials for each variant when practical.

If your feature requires compromises to ship within the test (e.g., skipping edge cases, simplified UI), note them for the cleanup stage.

---

## Stage 3 — Launch at 10%

Update `feature_flags.rb` to a **10/10/80** split and bump the flag version (e.g., `_v0` → `_v1`):

```ruby
feature :pc_new_product_card_v1, %w[test control excluded], "New Product Card" do
  case rand(1..10)
  when 1 then flags[0]
  when 2 then flags[1]
  else flags[2]
  end
end
```

Update the constant in `CatalogCaching` and `SignalmanConstants.js` to match the new version.

**Prepare a shutdown PR** — have it ready to merge immediately if something goes wrong. The shutdown PR should set the split to "excluded" and bump the flag version:

```ruby
feature :pc_new_product_card_v2, %w[test control excluded], "New Product Card" do
  "excluded"
end
```

---

## Stage 4 — Launch at 50%

Update `feature_flags.rb` to a **50/50** split:

```ruby
feature :pc_no_minimum_test_v2, %w[test control], "No Minimum Test"
```

Bump the feature flag version only if the test has been running at 10% for more than a few days. Otherwise keep the current version.

---

## Stage 5 — Launch at 100%

If confident with the feature, clean up A/B test code entirely (proceed to Stage 6).

If you still want the ability to exclude traffic, update the split to **100%** and bump the flag version:

```ruby
feature :qq_form, %w[test control], "Test = Show quick quote form at the bottom of the listings page for inkers" do
  "test"
end
```

---

## Shutdown & Cleanup

See [CLEANUP.md](CLEANUP.md) for shutdown procedures and post-test cleanup checklist.

module SignalmanHelper
  include StylesShowHelper
  include StylesConstantsHelper

  def merch_assist_tool_enabled?
    feature_flag(:catalog_mat) == "test"
  end

  def internal_user_with_merch_assist_tool?
    merch_assist_tool_enabled? && current_user_internal?
  end

  def algolia_recommendations_enabled?
    feature_flag(:pc_algolia_recommendations_v1) == "enabled"
  end

  def algolia_simplified_routing_test?
    feature_flag(:pc_simplified_routing_v0) == "test"
  end

  # Temporary port over from Signalmizely

  def mobile_color_swatches_test?
    feature_flag(:pc_catalog_mobile_color_swatches_v4) == "test"
  end

  def unified_image_config_test_enabled?
    feature_flag(:pc_unified_image_config_v0) == "test"
  end

  def pdp_recommendations_breakout_test_enabled?
    feature_flag(:pc_pdp_recommendations_breakout_v2) == "test"
  end

  def limit_color_swatches_test_enabled?
    feature_flag(:pc_limit_color_swatches_v0) == "test"
  end

  def false_door_test_enabled?
    feature_flag(:pc_false_door_v2) == "test"
  end

  def unbundled_price_test_enabled?
    feature_flag(:pc_unbundled_price_v0) == "test"
  end

  def pla_cta_sample_enabled?
    ss_pla? && ss_sample_form_eligible? && feature_flag(:pc_pla_cta_sample_v1) == "test"
  end

  def boosted_promo_products_test_enabled?
    feature_flag(:pc_boosted_promo_products_v1) == "test"
  end

  def march_promo_test_enabled?
    feature_flag(:pc_march_promo_v0) == "test"
  end

  def category_hero_test_enabled?
    feature_flag(:pc_category_hero_v1) == "test"
  end

  def top_rated_badge_test_enabled?
    feature_flag(:pc_top_rated_badge_v0) == "test"
  end

  def fav_retention_test_enabled?
    feature_flag(:pc_fav_retention_v0) == "test"
  end
end

module CatalogCaching
  include SignalmanHelper
  include SignalmizelyHelper
  include StylesHelper
  include CachingHelper
  include ImageHelper
  include FilterSortHelper
  include StylesConstantsHelper

  extend ActiveSupport::Concern

  EXPIRES_IN = 3.hours.freeze
  CACHE_VERSION = "v87".freeze
  CI_IGNORE_MARKETING_PARAMS = [:_ke, :oe, :utm_content, :utm_campaign, :utm_medium, :utm_source].freeze
  CATALOG_SEARCH_CACHE_KEY = "catalog_search".freeze
  INTERNAL_COLOR_SIZE_MAT_SEARCH_CACHE_KEY = "internal_color_size_search".freeze
  SIZE_AVAILABILITY_FILTER_TEST_CACHE_KEY = "size_availability_filter_v3".freeze
  HAT_YDH_TEST_CACHE_KEY = "hat_ydh_v2".freeze
  ALGOLIA_RECOMMENDATIONS_CACHE_KEY = "pc_algolia_recommendations_v1".freeze
  SIMPLIFIED_ROUTING_CACHE_KEY = "pc_simplified_routing_v0".freeze
  MOBILE_COLOR_SWATCHES_TEST_CACHE_KEY = "pc_catalog_mobile_color_swatches_v4".freeze
  UNIFIED_IMAGE_CONFIG_TEST_CACHE_KEY = "pc_unified_image_config_v0".freeze
  PDP_RECOMMENDATIONS_BREAKOUT_TEST_CACHE_KEY = "pc_pdp_recommendations_breakout_v2".freeze
  LIMIT_COLOR_SWATCHES_TEST_CACHE_KEY = "pc_limit_color_swatches_v0".freeze
  HATS_PROMO_TEST_CACHE_KEY = "pc_hats_promo_v2".freeze
  FALSE_DOOR_TEST_CACHE_KEY = "pc_false_door_v2".freeze
  UNBUNDLED_PRICE_TEST_CACHE_KEY = "pc_unbundled_price_v0".freeze
  BOOSTED_PROMO_PRODUCTS_TEST_CACHE_KEY = "pc_boosted_promo_products_v1".freeze
  SIGNALMIZELY_AA_TEST_CACHE_KEY = "edge_pc_signalmizely_aa_test_v0".freeze
  PLA_CTA_SAMPLE_CACHE_KEY = "pc_pla_cta_sample_v1".freeze
  MARCH_PROMO_TEST_CACHE_KEY = "pc_march_promo_v0".freeze
  CATEGORY_HERO_TEST_CACHE_KEY = "pc_category_hero_v1".freeze
  TOP_RATED_BADGE_TEST_CACHE_KEY = "pc_top_rated_badge_v0".freeze
  FAV_RETENTION_TEST_CACHE_KEY = "pc_fav_retention_v0".freeze

  included do
    include SubcategoryContentSettings

    helper_method :pc_shortcut_to_design
    helper_method :pc_shortcut_to_design?
    helper_method :style_card_cache_key_suffixes
  end

  private

  def internal_referrer?
    request.referrer =~ /customink.com/
  end

  def pc_shortcut_to_design
    return cookies["shortcut_to_design"] if cookies["shortcut_to_design"].present?

    cookies["shortcut_to_design"] = internal_referrer? ? "hide" : "show"
  end

  def pc_shortcut_to_design?
    return false if iframed? || /Custom\s/i.match(@mms_category&.name)
    return true if request.query_parameters[:force_seo_landing] == "true"

    %w[show show_hanes_tagless_t].include?(pc_shortcut_to_design)
  end

  def pc_shortcut_to_design_cache_key
    visibility = pc_shortcut_to_design
    "sd_search_#{visibility}_3"
  end

  def pc_cache_key
    keys = ["pc", CACHE_VERSION, pc_cache_request_path] + catalog_page_cache_key_suffixes
    ActiveSupport::Cache.expand_cache_key(keys)
  end

  def catalog_page_cache_key_suffixes(return_all = false)
    suffixes = []
    suffixes << pc_shortcut_to_design_cache_key if pc_shortcut_to_design? || return_all
    suffixes << "internal" if current_user_internal? || return_all
    suffixes << "iframed2" if iframed? || return_all
    suffixes << "json" if request[:format] == "json" || return_all
    suffixes << "subdomain" if shop_subdomain? || return_all
    suffixes += catalog_page_ab_test_suffixes(return_all)
    suffixes.compact.sort
  end

  def catalog_page_ab_test_suffixes(return_all)
    test_suffixes = []
    test_suffixes << CATALOG_SEARCH_CACHE_KEY if catalog_search? || return_all
    test_suffixes << ALGOLIA_RECOMMENDATIONS_CACHE_KEY if algolia_recommendations_enabled? || return_all
    test_suffixes << SIMPLIFIED_ROUTING_CACHE_KEY if algolia_simplified_routing_test? || return_all
    test_suffixes << MOBILE_COLOR_SWATCHES_TEST_CACHE_KEY if mobile_color_swatches_test? || return_all
    test_suffixes << UNIFIED_IMAGE_CONFIG_TEST_CACHE_KEY if unified_image_config_test_enabled? || return_all
    test_suffixes << PDP_RECOMMENDATIONS_BREAKOUT_TEST_CACHE_KEY if pdp_recommendations_breakout_test_enabled? || return_all
    test_suffixes << LIMIT_COLOR_SWATCHES_TEST_CACHE_KEY if limit_color_swatches_test_enabled? || return_all
    test_suffixes << FALSE_DOOR_TEST_CACHE_KEY if false_door_test_enabled? || return_all
    test_suffixes << UNBUNDLED_PRICE_TEST_CACHE_KEY if unbundled_price_test_enabled? || return_all
    test_suffixes << BOOSTED_PROMO_PRODUCTS_TEST_CACHE_KEY if boosted_promo_products_test_enabled? || return_all
    test_suffixes << SIGNALMIZELY_AA_TEST_CACHE_KEY if signalmizely_aa_test_enabled? || return_all
    test_suffixes << PLA_CTA_SAMPLE_CACHE_KEY if pla_cta_sample_enabled? || return_all
    test_suffixes << MARCH_PROMO_TEST_CACHE_KEY if march_promo_test_enabled? || return_all
    test_suffixes << CATEGORY_HERO_TEST_CACHE_KEY if category_hero_test_enabled? || return_all
    test_suffixes << TOP_RATED_BADGE_TEST_CACHE_KEY if top_rated_badge_test_enabled? || return_all
    test_suffixes << FAV_RETENTION_TEST_CACHE_KEY if fav_retention_test_enabled? || return_all
    test_suffixes
  end

  def style_card_cache_key_suffix_for(name)
    suffix = (name == :category) ? @mms_category&.id : params[name]&.join("_")
    return if suffix.blank?

    "/#{name}_#{suffix}"
  end

  def style_card_cache_key_suffixes(return_all = false)
    suffixes = []
    suffixes << "/iframed" if iframed? || return_all
    suffixes << "/lab_image_ydh" if lab_image_category?(@mms_category&.id) || return_all
    suffixes << "/with_colors" if fs_color_state? || return_all
    suffixes << "/lab_image_only" if lab_image_without_ydh_category?(@mms_category&.id) || return_all
    suffixes << "/catalog_search" if catalog_search? || return_all

    # compatible type
    suffixes += compatibility_types.map { |t| "/compat_#{t}" } if return_all
    suffixes << "/compat_#{compatible_style.compatible_type}" if compatible_type? && !return_all
    suffixes << "/compat_#{compatible_type_param}" if compatible_type_param? && !return_all

    # A/B test cache keys
    suffixes << "/#{INTERNAL_COLOR_SIZE_MAT_SEARCH_CACHE_KEY}#{style_card_cache_key_suffix_for(:colors)}#{style_card_cache_key_suffix_for(:sizes)}" if (internal_user_with_merch_assist_tool? && color_and_size_search?) || return_all
    suffixes << "/#{SIZE_AVAILABILITY_FILTER_TEST_CACHE_KEY}/#{style_card_cache_key_suffix_for(:category)}#{style_card_cache_key_suffix_for(:sizes)}" if size_availability_filter_eligible?(@mms_category&.id) || return_all
    suffixes << "/#{HAT_YDH_TEST_CACHE_KEY}_#{@mms_category.id}" if hat_ydh_category?(@mms_category&.id) || return_all
    suffixes << "/#{TOP_RATED_BADGE_TEST_CACHE_KEY}" if top_rated_badge_test_enabled? || return_all
    suffixes.compact.sort
  end

  def pc_cache_options
    {expires_in: pc_expires_in, race_condition_ttl: 1.minute}
  end

  def pc_cache_request_path
    pc_cache_request_base_key << pc_cache_query_params_digest.to_s
  end

  def pc_cache_request_base_key
    if params[:controller] == "categories"
      key = "products/"
      key << "categories/#{params[:id]}/" if pc_cat_non_index_page?
      key << "styles/" if params[:action] == "styles"
      key
    elsif params[:controller] == "styles" && params[:action] == "show"
      "products/styles/#{params[:styleno]}/"
    else
      request.path.sub(%r{^/+}, "").sub(%r{(?<!/)\Z}, "/")
    end
  end

  def pc_cat_non_index_page?
    params[:action] == "subcategories" || params[:action] == "styles"
  end

  def pc_cache_query_params_digest
    query_params = request.query_parameters.except(*CI_IGNORE_MARKETING_PARAMS)
    return nil if query_params.blank?

    sorted_params = query_params.keys.sort.map do |k|
      [k, query_params[k].respond_to?(:sort) ? query_params[k].sort : query_params[k]]
    end
    Digest::SHA2.hexdigest sorted_params.to_json
  end

  def pc_cache_fetch
    cached_body = Rails.cache.fetch(pc_cache_key, pc_cache_options) do
      yield
      (200..299).cover?(response.status) ? response.body : break
    end
    response.body = cached_body unless cached_body.nil?
    pc_set_response_headers unless (300..399).cover?(response.status)
  end

  def pc_cache_fetch_unflagged?
    @pc_cache_fetch_unflagged if defined? @pc_cache_fetch_unflagged
  end

  def pc_cache_fetch_unflagged
    @pc_cache_fetch_unflagged = true
    pc_expires_in!
    pc_cache_fetch { yield }
  end

  def pc_expires_in!
    return if Rails.env.test?
    expires_in pc_expires_in, public: true, stale_while_revalidate: 30.days, stale_if_error: 30.days
  end

  def pc_expires_in
    (Rails.env.production? || Rails.env.staging?) ? EXPIRES_IN : 30.seconds
  end

  def pc_set_response_headers
    response.set_header("x-pc-cache-key", pc_cache_key)
    response.set_header("Content-Type", "application/json") if request.format.json?
  end

  def cat_tshirts?
    params["action"] == "styles" && params["id"] == "16"
  end
end

content.text:
Here's the filled-in PR description:

---

### Stakeholder Overview

A/B test `pc_boosted_promo_products_v1` concluded with a negative result — boosted products did not improve the trending products widget. This PR removes all test infrastructure: the feature flag, Signalman helper, CloudFront cache key, and all JS/TS test branching logic.

### Risk Estimate

- ✅ Negligible risk!

### Changes

Removes all code introduced for the `pc_boosted_promo_products_v1` A/B test:

- **`config/feature_flags.rb`** — removed `pc_boosted_promo_products_v1` feature definition
- **`app/controllers/concerns/catalog_caching.rb`** — removed `BOOSTED_PROMO_PRODUCTS_TEST_CACHE_KEY` constant and its reference in `catalog_page_ab_test_suffixes`
- **`app/helpers/signalman_helper.rb`** — removed `boosted_promo_products_test_enabled?`
- **`app/javascript/utils/constants/signalmanConstants.ts`** — removed `boostedPromoProductsTest` export
- **`app/javascript/features/TrendingProducts/hooks/useTrendingProducts.js`** — removed flag check and `withBoostedProducts` query param
- **`app/javascript/features/TrendingProducts/TrendingCarousel.jsx`** — removed `fireABTestGroupEvent` call and `hasFiredABTestEvent` ref
- **`app/javascript/hooks/queries/recommendations.js`** — removed `withBoostedProducts` from `fetchPromotionalProducts` and `usePromotionalProducts`
- **`app/javascript/utils/metrics/trendingPromoProducts.ts`** — removed `fireABTestGroupEvent`, `ABTestGroup` type, AB test constants, and `isBoosted` conditional
- **`useTrendingProducts.test.jsx`** — removed signalmanConstants mock and "Boosted Products Feature Flag" describe block

##### Updated Dependencies
- None

### Project Link

<!-- [Monday issue](https://customink.monday.com/boards/12345/pulses/12345) -->

### Screenshots

No visual changes.

### Notes

The control behavior (no boosted products) is now the permanent behavior. No rollback needed — the flag was already at 0% at cleanup time.

Both events still fire:

- `recommendation_view` — `TrendingCarousel.jsx:179` via `IntersectionObserver` when the carousel enters the viewport
- `recommendation_click` — `TrendingCarousel.jsx:247` on product card click

No changes were made to either call site. The only thing removed from the metrics file was the `fireABTestGroupEvent` (the test-group tracking event), which is expected.
